info.longName: Innovator Equity Defined Protection ETF - 1 Yr September

funds_data.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in FLexible EXchange® Options (“FLEX Options”) that reference the SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust (the “Underlying ETF”). The fund is non-diversified.
